title: ferray-linalg: trace has no offset= or dtype= parameter
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.linalg.trace(x, offset=0, dtype=None) supports diagonal offset (k-th diagonal instead of main diagonal) and output dtype specification. ferray-linalg's trace() presumably only computes the main diagonal sum. Add offset parameter for super/sub-diagonal traces.
